/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/expected_test.dir/expected_test.cpp.o -o ../../bin/tests/expected_test  /usr/lib/libCatch2Main.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib/libCatch2.a
